name: Nancy's Apple Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together.
2. In a separate bowl, dissolve the baking soda in lemon juice.
3. Mix in the eggs and vanilla to the baking soda mixture.
4. Beat the butter mixture and egg mixture together.
5. Gradually add the flour and salt, mixing until combined.
6. Gently fold in the apples.
7. Mix the crumb ingredients: cinnamon, sugar, flour, and cold butter or margarine until a coarse crumb texture forms.
8. Spoon half of the batter into a greased stoneware loaf pan.
9. Sprinkle with half of the crumb mixture.
10. Spoon in the remaining batter and sprinkle with the remaining crumb mixture.
11. Press the crumbs gently into the surface of the batter.
12. Bake at 375°F for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
13. Cool slightly in the pan.
14. Remove the bread from the pan and cool completely on a cooling rack.
